title: When the Domino Falls

"'''When the Domino Falls'''" is a short story written by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] by [[West End Games]] in [[August]] [[1994]] and was later archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] on [[March 4]], [[2005]].

==Plot summary==
[[Drake Paulsen]] and his [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] colleagues break out of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison cell]] on [[Omman]]. Returning to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]], Drake hears the news that his [[Parent/Legends|father]], [[Kaine Paulsen|Kaine]], [[Death/Legends|died]] while on a smuggling run to [[Thrugii]]. Determined to carry on his father occupation and assignment, Drake and his newfound [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] companion, [[Nikaede Celso]], begin their smuggling career abord the [[Steadfast (720 light freighter)|Steadfast]].
